en.hero.title: Turning Data into Strategy.

en.about.title: The Bridge and the Data
en.about.description: I believe data is useless without context. My background in business management helps me to see the 'why' behind the numbers. I´m specializing in identifying patterns that lead to efficiency gains and revenue growth.
